subject: New Mortgage File — Jennifer Okafor
body:
Hi,

My name is Marcus Lindqvist from Summit Peak Mortgage Inc. (Lic.
#MB990134). I have a new file for your review.

Borrower: Jennifer Adaeze Okafor Property: 47 Lozinski Drive, Red Deer, AB
T4R 2W9 Loan Request: First mortgage refinance — $270,000 — refinancing
existing CIBC mortgage Existing mortgage: CIBC (matures February 2028)

Documents attached: Loan Application, Credit Bureau, T4 (2025), Appraisal,
PNW Statement

Please advise on next steps.

Marcus Lindqvist

Summit Peak Mortgage Inc. Lic. #MB990134
